channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: No Jackpot Winners in PCSO Superlotto 6/49 and Ultra Lotto 6/58 Draws on May 17, 2026
item.description: According to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO), there were no jackpot winners in the major lotto draws held on Sunday, May 17, 2026. For the Superlotto 6/49, the winning combination was...

item.title: Lou Yanong Names the Funniest Member of Task Force Alpha in Blood vs Duty
item.description: In this latest entertainment update from ABS-CBN, popular personality Lou Yanong shares her thoughts on the members of Task Force Alpha in the upcoming series Blood vs Duty. She identifies who she con...

item.title: Young South Africans turn to social media to build businesses as personal shoppers amid rising unemployment
item.description: With South Africa’s unemployment rate climbing from 32.4% to 37.1%, many young people are turning to hustle culture for survival. One such example is 21-year-old Elona Njube, who moved to Johannesburg...

item.title: Ukraine conducts large-scale drone attacks on Moscow and Belgorod regions
item.description: In a significant escalation of the ongoing conflict, Ukraine launched nearly 600 drones in overnight attacks on Russia, resulting in four confirmed fatalities—three in the Moscow region and one in Bel...

item.title: Kenyan Musician Timmy TDat and Partner Kendi Expect First Child
item.description: Kenyan rapper Timmy TDat and his partner Kendi have confirmed they are expecting a baby together. Kendi had kept her pregnancy private until the third trimester, sharing glimpses on social media witho...

item.title: Osun APC Congratulates Candidates After Peaceful House of Representatives Primaries, Calls for Patience on Results
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) in Osun State on Sunday praised the peaceful conduct of its House of Representatives primary elections across the state. In a statement by APC spokesperson Kola Ola...

item.title: BJMP Officer Arrested for Threatening a Woman and Firing Gun in Tondo Residential Area
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — A 31-year-old officer of the Bureau of Jail Management and Penology (BJMP) was arrested in Tondo, Manila, after allegedly threatening a woman with a firearm and firing indiscrimi...

item.title: Police appeal for witnesses after man assaulted by group of youths at Gungahlin tram station
item.description: ACT Police are seeking public assistance to identify a group of youths involved in an alleged assault at the Gungahlin Marketplace tram station on Friday night, 15 May 2026. The incident occurred betw...

item.title: Spotify celebrates 20 years, reveals most-streamed artists, albums, and songs globally
item.description: Spotify don celebrate 20 years of existence, and as part of the anniversary wahala, dem don release special personalised insights wey dey show how listeners don enjoy music since day one. This feature...

item.title: India and Netherlands Launch Joint Initiative to Boost Clean Energy Cooperation
item.description: India and the Netherlands have officially established a joint working group aimed at accelerating the expansion of clean energy in India. This initiative, announced by Union Minister Pralhad Joshi, is...

item.title: US-Mexico Border Wall Construction Impacts Sacred Indigenous Sites
item.description: Indigenous leaders from the Kumeyaay Nation and Tohono O’odham Nation have raised concerns about ongoing construction of the US-Mexico border wall, asserting that sacred sites and cultural heritage ar...

item.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC and Uganda a public health emergency
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has declared an Ebola outbreak affecting the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern. The outbreak is c...

item.title: Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh Plans to Reduce Balance Sheet, Implications for Investors
item.description: Kevin Warsh has assumed the role of Federal Reserve chair, succeeding Jerome Powell, and he intends to significantly shrink the Fed's $6.7 trillion balance sheet. This is a major departure from the pa...

item.title: Ontario advances Barrie-Sudbury power line amid environmental concerns
item.description: Ontario is moving forward with plans to fast-track the construction of a 500-kilovolt transmission line between Barrie and Sudbury, expected to be operational by 2032. The province says the project wi...

item.title: Emfuleni faces persistent challenges in waste collection and illegal dumping
item.description: Communities in parts of Vanderbijlpark, Sharpeville, Boipatong, and Sebokeng in the Vaal are facing a severe waste management crisis, with uncollected rubbish piling up on streets and turning some are...

item.title: APC Ekiti North Federal Constituency Primary Declared Inconclusive Over Irregularities and Crisis
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) Primary Election Committee for Ekiti State has declared the House of Representatives primary in Ekiti North Federal Constituency 1 inconclusive. This one involve th...

item.title: Nigeria Customs Seize Cocaine Worth N2.35bn, 15 Trailers of Imported Rice and Other Contraband
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service (NCS), Federal Operations Unit Zone ‘A’, Ikeja, don seize cocaine valued at N2.35 billion along with 15 trailers of imported rice, plus plenty other contraband across South...

item.title: Yobe Police Nab Six Suspects Over Currency Fraud
item.description: The Yobe State Police Command don successfully arrest six people wey dem suspect say dey involved in currency counterfeiting across different parts of the state. The arrests na part of the ongoing eff...

item.title: Yvonne Okwara: Profile of Citizen TV's Senior News Anchor, Her Luhya-Teso Roots, Career and Personal Life
item.description: Yvonne Okwara Buliba Matole is one of Kenya's most respected television journalists, currently working as a Senior News Anchor and Editor at Citizen TV under Royal Media Services. Born on 16 March 198...

item.title: WHO Declares Bundibugyo Ebola Outbreak in Congo and Uganda a Global Health Emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has declared a public health emergency of international concern due to an outbreak of the rare Bundibugyo ebolavirus in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda....
